meaning: 1. to tend; 2. to take care of sb
sentence: 她一个人照料三个孩子，很辛苦。
pinyin: Tā yī gè rén zhàoliào sān gè háizi, hěn xīnkǔ.
english: She looks after three children on her own — it's really hard.

sentence: 他刚考到驾照，还不太敢上高速。
pinyin: Tā gāng kǎo dào jiàzhào, hái bú tài gǎn shàng gāosù.
english: He just got his driver's license and is still too nervous to drive on the highway.

meaning: 1. to waken (to action); 2. to rouse (the masses); 3. to evoke (attent
sentence: 这首老歌唤起了他对童年的很多回忆。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu lǎo gē huànqǐle tā duì tóngnián de hěn duō huíyì.
english: This old song evoked many childhood memories for him.

sentence: 他每天早上都去查一下信箱。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang dōu qù chá yīxià xìn xiāng.
english: He checks the mailbox every morning.

sentence: 她周末去参加了一个烘焙培训班。
pinyin: Tā zhōu mò qù cān jiā le yí gè hōng bèi péi xùn bān.
english: She attended a baking training class on the weekend.

sentence: 手机支付让购物变得更加便捷。
pinyin: Shǒujī zhīfù ràng gòuwù biàn de gèngjiā biàn jié.
english: Mobile payment has made shopping much more convenient and fast.

sentence: 身体不舒服要及时就医。
pinyin: Shēntǐ bù shūfu yào jíshí jiùyī.
english: If you feel unwell, you should seek medical treatment promptly.

meaning: to examine sth and make a decision; to screen; to evaluate; to approve
sentence: 这份方案还没有经过审定。
pinyin: Zhè fèn fāng'àn hái méiyǒu jīngguò shěndìng.
english: This plan has not yet been reviewed and approved.

sentence: 她每天早上吃一个橘子。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang chī yī gè júzi.
english: She eats a tangerine every morning.

meaning: border area; borderland; frontier; frontier region
sentence: 他志愿去边疆支援建设。
pinyin: Tā zhìyuàn qù biānjiāng zhīyuán jiànshè.
english: He volunteered to go to the frontier to support development.

sentence: 国际社会呼吁禁止使用核弹。
pinyin: Guójì shèhuì hūyù jìnzhǐ shǐyòng hédàn.
english: The international community calls for a ban on nuclear warheads.

sentence: 孩子的创造力需要从小培养。
pinyin: Háizi de chuàngzàolì xūyào cóng xiǎo péiyǎng.
english: Children's creativity needs to be nurtured from an early age.

meaning: 1. to counterfeit; 2. to pass off a fake as genuine
sentence: 他因造假账目被公司解雇。
pinyin: Tā yīn zàojiǎ zhàngmù bèi gōngsī jiěgù.
english: He was fired by the company for falsifying accounts.

sentence: 一辆装甲车停在路口。
pinyin: Yī liàng zhuāngjǐa chē tíng zài lùkǒu.
english: An armored vehicle was parked at the intersection.

meaning: 1. to gather; 2. to congregate; 3. to aggregate
sentence: 鸟儿群集在湖边觅食。
pinyin: Niǎor qúnjí zài hú biān mìshí.
english: Birds gathered in flocks by the lake to feed.

sentence: 议员对部长提出了质询。
pinyin: Yìyuán duì bùzhǎng tíchū le zhìxún.
english: The legislator questioned the minister.

sentence: 著名指挥家今晚将亲自登台。
pinyin: Zhùmíng zhǐhuījiā jīn wǎn jiāng qīnzì dēngtái.
english: The famous conductor will take the stage in person tonight.

sentence: 物理课上老师讲解了刚体的运动规律。
pinyin: Wùlǐ kè shàng lǎoshī jiǎngjiě le gāngtǐ de yùndòng guīlǜ.
english: In physics class the teacher explained the laws of motion of a rigid body.

sentence: 这栋楼的居住者大多是上班族。
pinyin: Zhè dòng lóu de jūzhùzhě dàduō shì shàngbānzú.
english: Most of the inhabitants of this building are office workers.

sentence: 足球联赛推动了运动员职业化。
pinyin: Zúqiú liánsài tuīdòng le yùndòngyuán zhíyèhuà.
english: The football league has driven the professionalization of athletes.

meaning: Feeling of safety; Sense of safety
sentence: 有稳定工作让她有安全感。
pinyin: Yǒu wěndìng gōngzuò ràng tā yǒu ānquángǎn.
english: Having a stable job gives her a sense of security.

sentence: 桌上堆积了很多未读的文件。
pinyin: Zhuō shàng duījī le hěn duō wèi dú de wénjiàn.
english: A pile of unread documents has accumulated on the desk.

meaning: To gaze, stair; To gaze, stare
sentence: 她的新发型引起了大家的注目。
pinyin: Tā de xīn fàxíng yǐnqǐ le dàjiā de zhùmù.
english: Her new hairstyle attracted everyone's attention.

sentence: 请大家去三楼会议室开会。
pinyin: Qǐng dàjiā qù sān lóu huìyìshì kāihuì.
english: Please everyone go to the third-floor meeting room for the meeting.

meaning: 1. to mark out; 2. to tag; 3. to put a sign on sth explaining or calli
sentence: 请在地图上标注出医院的位置。
pinyin: Qǐng zài dìtú shàng biāozhù chū yīyuàn de wèizhì.
english: Please mark the location of the hospital on the map.

meaning: 1. the wording and purport of what one writes
sentence: 他笔下的人物形象生动真实。
pinyin: Tā bǐxià de rénwù xíngxiàng shēngdòng zhēnshí.
english: The characters he writes are vivid and true to life.

sentence: 山里的空气非常纯净。
pinyin: Shān lǐ de kōngqì fēicháng chúnjìng.
english: The air in the mountains is very pure.

sentence: 船队穿越大洋，历时三个月。
pinyin: Chuánduì chuānyuè dàyáng, lìshí sān gè yuè.
english: The fleet crossed the ocean in three months.

sentence: 警察没收了他藏匿的枪支。
pinyin: Jǐngchá mòshōu le tā cángnì de qiāngzhī.
english: The police confiscated the guns he had hidden.

sentence: 工厂新引进了一条自动化生产线。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng xīn yǐnjìn le yì tiáo zìdònghuà shēngchǎnxiàn.
english: The factory has introduced a new automated assembly line.

sentence: 这个齿轮磨损了，需要更换。
pinyin: Zhège chǐlún mósǔn le, xūyào gēnghuàn.
english: This gear is worn out and needs to be replaced.

meaning: 1. to engulf; 2. to sweep; 3. to carry away everything
sentence: 寒流席卷了整个北方地区。
pinyin: Hánliú xíjuǎn le zhěnggè běifāng dìqū.
english: A cold wave swept across the entire northern region.

meaning: 1. casualty; 2. victim (of an accident); 3. wounded person
sentence: 救护车已将伤者送往医院。
pinyin: Jiùhùchē yǐ jiāng shāngzhě sòngwǎng yīyuàn.
english: The ambulance has taken the injured to the hospital.

sentence: 他收藏了很多古代钱币。
pinyin: Tā shōucáng le hěn duō gǔdài qiánbì.
english: He collects a lot of ancient coins.

meaning: 1. nomadic; 2. to move about in search of pasture; 3. to rove around a
sentence: 这个民族过着游牧生活，随季节迁移。
pinyin: Zhège mínzú guòzhe yóumù shēnghuó, suí jìjié qiānyí.
english: This ethnic group lives a nomadic life, migrating with the seasons.

meaning: 1. to seek by inquiry or search; 2. to call on; 3. to visit
sentence: 记者专程探访了这位老艺人。
pinyin: Jìzhě zhuānchéng tànfǎng le zhè wèi lǎo yìrén.
english: The reporter made a special trip to visit the old artisan.

sentence: 工程师正在检修汽车的动力系统。
pinyin: Gōngchéngshī zhèngzài jiǎnxiū qìchē de dònglì xìtǒng.
english: The engineer is servicing the car's propulsion system.

meaning: 1. to detain; 2. to take into custody; 3. detention; 4. imprisonment
sentence: 嫌疑人被羁押了四十八小时。
pinyin: Xiányírén bèi jīyā le sìshíbā xiǎoshí.
english: The suspect was detained for forty-eight hours.

meaning: 1. landing; 2. touchdown; 3. to land; 4. to touch down
sentence: 飞机顺利着陆，旅客鼓掌欢呼。
pinyin: Fēijī shùnlì zhuólù, lǚkè gǔzhǎng huānhū.
english: The plane landed smoothly and the passengers applauded.

sentence: 跑完全程后，他感到无比快意。
pinyin: Pǎo wán quánchéng hòu, tā gǎndào wúbǐ kuàiyì.
english: After finishing the full course, he felt immensely elated.

meaning: 1. ad hoc; 2. to set up specially
sentence: 学校为新生特设了一个辅导班。
pinyin: Xuéxiào wèi xīnshēng tèshè le yí gè fǔdǎobān.
english: The school set up a special tutoring class for new students.

sentence: 两国签署了引渡协议。
pinyin: Liǎng guó qiānshǔ le yǐndù xiéyì.
english: The two countries signed an extradition agreement.

sentence: 她帮朋友代购了一款进口护肤品。
pinyin: Tā bāng péngyou dàigòu le yì kuǎn jìnkǒu hùfūpǐn.
english: She bought an imported skincare product on behalf of her friend.

sentence: 他买彩票居然中了头奖！
pinyin: Tā mǎi cǎipiào jūrán zhòng le tóujiǎng!
english: He actually won the first prize in the lottery!

sentence: 庙里供奉着一尊木雕神像。
pinyin: Miào lǐ gōngfèng zhe yì zūn mùdiāo shénxiàng.
english: A wooden carved statue of a deity is enshrined in the temple.

sentence: 图书馆为孩子们准备了丰富的读物。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn wèi háizimen zhǔnbèi le fēngfù de dúwù.
english: The library has prepared a rich selection of reading materials for the children.

sentence: 这门课介绍中国思想史的发展脉络。
pinyin: Zhè mén kè jièshào Zhōngguó sīxiǎngshǐ de fāzhǎn màiluò.
english: This course introduces the development of Chinese intellectual history.

sentence: 老师提供了几份参考资料供同学查阅。
pinyin: Lǎoshī tígōng le jǐ fèn cānkǎo zīliào gōng tóngxué cháyuè.
english: The teacher provided several reference materials for students to consult.

meaning: forming a continuous sheet; continuous; contiguous; closely grouped
sentence: 洪水过后，农田连片受损，损失惨重。
pinyin: Hóng shuǐ guò hòu, nóng tián lián piàn shòu sǔn, sǔn shī cǎn zhòng.
english: After the flood, farmland was damaged across a continuous stretch, resulting in heavy losses.

sentence: 越来越多的人喜欢生态旅游，去大自然放松。
pinyin: Yuè lái yuè duō de rén xǐ huān shēng tài lǚ yóu, qù dà zì rán fàng sōng.
english: More and more people enjoy ecotourism to relax in nature.
